schedule.title: Hackathon Kickoff
schedule.description: The hackathon begins! Start building your innovative solution.

schedule.title: Hackathon Ends

schedule.title: Results & Awards
schedule.description: Winners announced and prizes awarded in a live ceremony.

faq.question: Who can participate in CodeForge 3.0?
faq.answer: Open to students, professionals, and coding enthusiasts of all skill levels. Beginner or expert — you're welcome!

faq.question: Do I need a team?
faq.answer: Teams of 2–4 are encouraged. Solo entries are welcome too. We'll help you connect with others at the networking session.

faq.question: What should I bring?
faq.answer: Laptop, chargers, student ID, and enthusiasm. We provide food, drinks, WiFi, and workspace throughout the event.

faq.question: Are there problem statements?
faq.answer: Yes! Announced at the opening ceremony. Themes span AI/ML, Web3, IoT, Sustainability, and Social Impact.

faq.question: What are the prizes?
faq.answer: Cash prizes, certificates, mentorship, and internship offers from sponsors. All participants get certificates and merch!

faq.question: Can I use external libraries?
faq.answer: Yes! Any open-source tools are allowed. Core innovation must be original work created during the hackathon.

faq.question: Is there a registration fee?
faq.answer: No! Completely free — including events, meals, networking, workshops, and mentorship.

faq.question: Will there be mentors?
faq.answer: Yes! Industry experts and senior developers are available throughout to give guidance and technical support.
